# Free From the System

> The system is broken. Your health doesn't have to be.

Free From the System is an educational resource on healthcare sovereignty, medical debt freedom, and health alternatives. Written by Kalesh — Consciousness Teacher & Writer.

## About

This site contains 300 original articles organized across five pillars:
- The Escape: Leaving traditional healthcare — DPC, health shares, transition strategies
- The Alternative: Evidence-based integrative and alternative health approaches
- The Math: The real numbers behind healthcare costs
- The Debt: Medical debt survival — rights, negotiation, recovery
- The Sovereignty: Health autonomy as philosophy and practice

## Author

Kalesh — Consciousness Teacher & Writer
Website: https://kalesh.love

## Key Topics

- Direct Primary Care (DPC)
- Health Sharing Ministries
- Healthcare Cost Transparency
- Medical Debt Negotiation
- Functional Medicine
- Health Sovereignty
- Insurance Alternatives
- Catastrophic Coverage
- Preventive Health
- Healthcare System Reform
